zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Bulkeley of Haughton於從1340年到1355年出生在英國爾豪頓時，他的父親Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle44歲，母親Agnes de Cheadle46歲。他於大約1373年與Nichola le Bird在英國英格蘭史洛普爾豪頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Bulkeley of Haughton于从1340年到1355年出生在英国爾豪頓时，他的父亲Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle44岁，母亲Agnes de Cheadle46岁。他于大约1373年与Nichola le Bird在英国英格兰史洛普爾豪頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Bulkeley of Haughton was born from 1340 to 1355, in Haughton, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle, was 44 and his mother, Agnes de Cheadle, was 46. He married Nichola le Bird about 1373, in Haughton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Bulkeley of Haughton est né du 1340 au 1355, à Haughton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Cheadle, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Nichola le Bird environ 1373, à Haughton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Bulkeley of Haughton von 1340 bis 1355 in Haughton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle 44 und seine Mutter Agnes de Cheadle 46. Er hat um 1373 in Haughton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Nichola le Bird geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Bulkeley of Haughton è nato il da 1340 a 1355 nel Haughton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Cheadle, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Nichola le Bird circa 1373, nel Haughton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Bulkeley of Haughtonがから1340年まで1355年にイギリスチェシュアイアハウトンで生まれた時，父Richard Bulkeley of Cheadleは44歳，母Agnes de Cheadleは46歳であった。約1373年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアハウトンでNichola le Birdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Bulkeley of Haughton(이)가 1340년 부터 1355년 까지 영국 체실르 하우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Cheadle(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 하우그h턴에서 Nichola le Bird(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Bulkeley of Haughton nasceu de 1340 a 1355, em Haughton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Cheadle, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichola le Bird aproximadamente 1373, em Haughton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Bulkeley of Haughton родился с 1340 по 1355 в местности хотон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Cheadle, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichola le Bird около 1373 г. в местности хотон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Bulkeley of Haughton nació desde 1340 hasta 1355, en Haughton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnes de Cheadle, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Nichola le Bird aproximadamente 1373, en Haughton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en su pueblo.
